activated_rules.rule_name: General Goods Description with Invoice Reference

consignor.certificate_value:
West Food i Göteborg AB
Ringögatan 33
41707, Göteborg
SWEDEN
consignor.invoice_value:
West Food i Göteborg AB
Ringögatan 33
417 07 Gothenburg
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'West Food i Göteborg AB' from certificate appears exactly as invoice issuer in invoice header and address blocks after allowed normalization (legal form, accents, whitespace). The country 'SWEDEN' matches 'Sweden' after normalization. No contradictory information found. Thus, consignor is verified to match invoice issuer.

consignee.certificate_value:
Ikano Pte Ltd / Ikea Tampines
60 Tampines North Drive 2
SG-528764
Singapore
consignee.invoice_value:
Ikano Pte Ltd / Tampines
IKEA Tampines
60 Tampines North Drive 2
SG-528764
Singapore
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Ikano Pte Ltd / Ikea Tampines' matches invoice consignee 'Ikano Pte Ltd / Tampines / IKEA Tampines' with address in Singapore after allowed normalization. Certificate consignee corresponds to invoice 'Invoice to' or 'Bill to' field as priority. Country 'Singapore' matches in both documents.

goods_description.certificate_value:
Food products: Pickled cucumber, Apple mash, 
Mineral water, 
Sauce, Cookies, Chocolate, Crisps, Snacks and Candy.
goods_description.invoice_value: Detailed item descriptions including Pickled Sliced Gherkins, Apple mash, Mineral water, Sauce, Cookies, Chocolate Crisps, Snacks and Candy among multiple product lines
goods_description.motivation: Certificate contains a general goods description combined with an explicit invoice reference (numbers 110545, 110546) and invoice dates matching those on invoice pages. This satisfies rule 4.3.5 for general goods description with invoice reference, allowing verification without detailed item matching.

quantity.invoice_value:
Gross Weight in kg: 8 004,840
Net Weight in kg: 7 130,880
quantity.motivation: Quantities for Gross Weight and Net Weight in certificate exactly match corresponding invoice totals after allowed normalization of decimal marks and thousand separators. Units 'Kg' and weight categories 'Gross' and 'Net' are consistent and explicitly stated on both documents. No discrepancies found.

origin.certificate_value: European Community - SE, SK, BE, FI, NL, NO
origin.invoice_value: Country of origin in invoice shows SE, SK, BE, FI, NL, NO as per item-level origins
origin.motivation: Certificate origin listing 'European Community - SE, SK, BE, FI, NL, NO' matches invoice origins where each listed country is explicitly identified as country of origin for products. EU origin normalization applies, treating 'European Community' as EU inclusive of listed countries. No country in certificate missing in invoice origins.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points (Consignor, Consignee, Goods description, Quantity, Origin) are verified to match with explicit data or allowed normalization. No discrepancies or manual review triggers found.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
